name: LibCRC.Generic_Nbit_CRCs

documentation.description: This package provides common parts for all CRCs of a specific bit-size.

array_types.name: CRC_Table_Type
array_types.code: type CRC_Table_Type is array (Interfaces.Unsigned_8) of CRC_Type;

access_types.name: CRC_Table_Access
access_types.code: type CRC_Table_Access is not null access constant CRC_Table_Type;

documentation.description: Reverse the bits in a CRC

Generate a CRC table for the given polynomial.

The N-bit polynomial is provided in implicit x^N term notation.
For example, the 8-bit value 16#07# represents the polynomial
x^8 + x^2 + x^1 + 1.

Generate a reflected CRC table for the given reflected polynomial.

The provided Polynomial must be bit-reversed. For example, the 8-bit
value 16#E0# represents the polynomial x^8 + x^2 + x + 1.

formals.name: Shift_Left
Shift_Right
